description: CompositionYellow round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, has a vented hem and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroideryFlash that smile on everyone’s face this winter with this happy T-shirt from puma. The cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the vented hem provides a perfect fit around the waist. Team this tee with jeans and sports shoes for that uber cool look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
